G4181.derivation: adverb from a compound of G4183 (πολύς) and G3313 (μέρος);
G4181.strongs_def: in many portions, i.e. variously as to time and agency (piecemeal)

G4133.strongs_def: moreover (besides), i.e. albeit, save that, rather, yet
G4133.kjv_def: but (rather), except, nevertheless, notwithstanding, save, than
G4133.usage: but(14x), nevertheless(8x), notwithstanding(4x), except(1x), than(1x), save(1x)

G4165.strongs_def: to tend as a shepherd of (figuratively, superviser)

G4185.kjv_def: costly, very precious, of great price

G4187.derivation: adverb from a compound of G4183 (πολύς) and G5158 (τρόπος);
G4187.strongs_def: in many ways, i.e. variously as to method or form

G4109.strongs_def: a moulding-board, i.e. flat surface ("plate", or tablet, literally or figuratively)

G4158.derivation: from G4228 (πούς) and another element of uncertain affinity;
G4158.strongs_def: a dress (G2066 (ἐσθής) implied) reaching the ankles

G4141.derivation: apparently another form of G4111 (πλάσσω) (through the idea of flattening out);
G4141.strongs_def: to pound, i.e. (figuratively) to inflict with (calamity)

G4190.strongs_def: hurtful, i.e. evil (properly, in effect or influence, and thus differing from G2556 (κακός), which refers rather to essential character, as well as from G4550 (σαπρός), which indicates degeneracy from original virtue); figuratively, calamitous; also (passively) ill, i.e. diseased; but especially (morally) culpable, i.e. derelict, vicious, facinorous; neuter (singular) mischief, malice, or (plural) guilt; masculine (singular) the devil, or (plural) sinners
G4190.kjv_def: bad, evil, grievous, harm, lewd, malicious, wicked(-ness)

G4102.strongs_def: persuasion, i.e. credence; moral conviction (of religious truth, or the truthfulness of God or a religious teacher), especially reliance upon Christ for salvation; abstractly, constancy in such profession; by extension, the system of religious (Gospel) truth itself

G4149.strongs_def: wealth (as fulness), i.e. (literally) money, possessions, or (figuratively) abundance, richness, (specially), valuable bestowment

G4159.derivation: from the base of G4213 (πόσις) with enclitic adverb of origin;
G4159.strongs_def: from which (as interrogative) or what (as relative) place, state, source or cause

G4179.derivation: from G4183 (πολύς) and probably a derivative of G4120 (πλέκω);
G4179.strongs_def: manifold, i.e. (neuter as noun) very much more

G4118.strongs_def: the largest number or very large

G4160.derivation: apparently a prolonged form of an obsolete primary;
G4160.strongs_def: to make or do (in a very wide application, more or less direct)
G4160.kjv_def: abide, + agree, appoint, X avenge, + band together, be, bear, + bewray, bring (forth), cast out, cause, commit, + content, continue, deal, + without any delay, (would) do(-ing), execute, exercise, fulfil, gain, give, have, hold, X journeying, keep, + lay wait, + lighten the ship, make, X mean, + none of these things move me, observe, ordain, perform, provide, + have purged, purpose, put, + raising up, X secure, shew, X shoot out, spend, take, tarry, + transgress the law, work, yield
G4160.usage: do(357x), make(113x), commit(9x), cause(9x), work(8x), shew(5x), bear(4x), keep(4x), fulfil(3x), deal(2x), perform(2x)

G4127.strongs_def: a stroke; by implication, a wound; figuratively, a calamity

G4147.strongs_def: to be (or become) wealthy (literally or figuratively)
G4147.kjv_def: be increased with goods, (be made, wax) rich

G4123.strongs_def: holding (desiring) more, i.e. eager for gain (avaricious, hence a defrauder)

G4171.strongs_def: warfare (literally or figuratively; a single encounter or a series)

G4100.strongs_def: to have faith (in, upon, or with respect to, a person or thing), i.e. credit; by implication, to entrust (especially one's spiritual well-being to Christ)
G4100.kjv_def: believe(-r), commit (to trust), put in trust with

G4108.strongs_def: roving (as a tramp), i.e. (by implication) an impostor or misleader;

G4106.strongs_def: objectively, fraudulence; subjectively, a straying from orthodoxy or piety

G4189.strongs_def: depravity, i.e. (specially), malice; plural (concretely) plots, sins

G4161.strongs_def: a product, i.e. fabric (literally or figuratively)

G4193.strongs_def: a Pontican, i.e. native of Pontus

G4126.derivation: probably a form of G4150 (πλύνω) (through the idea of plunging through the water);

G4168.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of G4167 (ποίμνη);

G4150.derivation: a prolonged form of an obsolete (to "flow");

G4155.strongs_def: to wheeze, i.e. (causative, by implication) to throttle or strangle (drown)

G4105.strongs_def: to (properly, cause to) roam (from safety, truth, or virtue)
G4105.kjv_def: go astray, deceive, err, seduce, wander, be out of the way

G4111.strongs_def: to mould, i.e. shape or fabricate

G4119.strongs_def: more in quantity, number, or quality; also (in plural) the major portion
G4119.kjv_def: X above, + exceed, more excellent, further, (very) great(-er), long(-er), (very) many, greater (more) part, + yet but

G4121.strongs_def: to do, make or be more, i.e. increase (transitively or intransitively); by extension, to superabound
G4121.kjv_def: abound, abundant, make to increase, have over

G4142.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of G4143 (πλοῖον);

G4113.strongs_def: a wide "plat" or "place", i.e. open square

G4107.strongs_def: a rover ("planet"), i.e. (figuratively) an erratic teacher

G4169.derivation: from the base of G4226 (ποῦ) and G3634 (οἷος);
G4169.strongs_def: individualizing interrogative (of character) what sort of, or (of number) which one

G4140.derivation: from a presumed derivative of G4130 (πλήθω);

G4180.derivation: from a compound of G4183 (πολύς) and G3056 (λόγος);

G4197.strongs_def: travel (by land); figuratively (plural) proceedings, i.e. career

G4152.strongs_def: non-carnal, i.e. (humanly) ethereal (as opposed to gross), or (dæmoniacally) a spirit (concretely), or (divinely) supernatural, regenerate, religious

G4134.strongs_def: replete, or covered over; by analogy, complete

G4112.strongs_def: moulded, i.e. (by implication) artificial or (figuratively) fictitious (false)

G4156.strongs_def: throttled, i.e. (neuter concretely) an animal choked to death (not bled)

G4151.strongs_def: a current of air, i.e. breath (blast) or a breeze; by analogy or figuratively, a spirit, i.e. (human) the rational soul, (by implication) vital principle, mental disposition, etc., or (superhuman) an angel, demon, or (divine) God, Christ's spirit, the Holy Spirit

G4170.strongs_def: to be (engaged) in warfare, i.e. to battle (literally or figuratively)

G4135.strongs_def: to carry out fully (in evidence), i.e. completely assure (or convince), entirely accomplish
G4135.kjv_def: most surely believe, fully know (persuade), make full proof of

G4139.strongs_def: (adverbially) close by; as noun, a neighbor, i.e. fellow (as man, countryman, Christian or friend)

G4137.strongs_def: to make replete, i.e. (literally) to cram (a net), level up (a hollow), or (figuratively) to furnish (or imbue, diffuse, influence), satisfy, execute (an office), finish (a period or task), verify (or coincide with a prediction), etc.
G4137.kjv_def: accomplish, X after, (be) complete, end, expire, fill (up), fulfil, (be, make) full (come), fully preach, perfect, supply

G4198.derivation: middle voice from a derivative of the same as G3984 (πεῖρα);
G4198.strongs_def: to traverse, i.e. travel (literally or figuratively; especially to remove (figuratively, die), live, etc.);
G4198.kjv_def: --depart, go (away, forth, one's way, up), (make a, take a) journey, walk

G4128.strongs_def: a fulness, i.e. a large number, throng, populace

G4103.usage: faithful(53x), believe(6x), believing(2x), true(2x), faithfully(1x), believer(1x), sure(1x)

G4130.derivation: a prolonged form of a primary (which appears only as an alternate in certain tenses and in the reduplicated form pimplemi);
G4130.strongs_def: to "fill" (literally or figuratively (imbue, influence, supply)); specially, to fulfil (time)

G4172.derivation: probably from the same as G4171 (πόλεμος), or perhaps from G4183 (πολύς);
G4172.strongs_def: a town (properly, with walls, of greater or less size)

G4138.strongs_def: repletion or completion, i.e. (subjectively) what fills (as contents, supplement, copiousness, multitude), or (objectively) what is filled (as container, performance, period)
G4138.kjv_def: which is put in to fill up, piece that filled up, fulfilling, full, fulness

G4195.strongs_def: a sea; Pontus, a region of Asia Minor

G4183.derivation: including the forms from the alternate ;
G4183.strongs_def: (singular) much (in any respect) or (plural) many; neuter (singular) as adverbial, largely; neuter (plural) as adverb or noun often, mostly, largely
G4183.kjv_def: abundant, + altogether, common, + far (passed, spent), (+ be of a) great (age, deal, -ly, while), long, many, much, oft(-en (-times)), plenteous, sore, straitly

G4122.strongs_def: to be covetous, i.e. (by implication) to over-reach
G4122.kjv_def: get an advantage, defraud, make a gain

G4176.derivation: middle voice of a derivative of G4177 (πολίτης);
